personas.name: Alex
personas.description: Alex is a user who values a seamless app experience and is looking for an app that is easy to use and provides helpful insights.

personas.name: Mia
personas.description: Mia is a user who has struggled with mental health issues and is looking for an app that can provide her with effective tools and resources to manage her mental health.
pain_points: Limited access to mental health resources

personas.name: Jake
personas.description: Jake is a user who is sensitive about his personal data and is looking for an app that respects his privacy and provides value for money.

personas.name: Emily
personas.description: Emily is a user who has tried various mental health apps and is looking for an app that stands out from the rest and provides unique features and benefits.

personas.name: Sarah
personas.description: Sarah is a user who is looking for an app that can help her gain a deeper understanding of herself and her emotions, and provide her with tools to improve her mental well-being.
